description_long: This is a rectangular, metal storage tank with a rugged, weathered surface, showing signs of rust and dark discoloration. The tank features a prominent X-shaped reinforcement on its broad faces, likely for structural integrity. A single, round screw cap is visible on the slanted top surface, suggesting an opening for filling or dispensing liquids. The tank's overall form is boxy with slightly beveled edges, and it appears to be constructed from heavy-gauge steel. The coloration is predominantly dark, with a mix of black, brown, and hints of blue, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible labels, warning signs, or additional attachments such as pipes or ladders.
description: A rugged, rectangular metal storage tank with a weathered, rusty surface and a single screw cap on top. Reinforced with X-shaped bracing, it has a dark, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: The broad side of the tank is visible, showing the X-shaped reinforcement and the slanted top with the screw cap partially visible.
description_view_1: The narrow end of the tank is shown, with the screw cap clearly visible on the slanted top and no reinforcement details.
description_view_2: The opposite broad side is visible, mirroring the X-shaped reinforcement and showing the slanted top with the screw cap at a different angle.
description_view_3: The other narrow end is shown, with no visible cap or reinforcement details, presenting a plain, dark surface.
